segments.text: Hard to create openings with a spin against that neutral getup near the blast zone
segments.original_text: 上でのこのその場起きに対してスピンでリスクつけるのがもう難しい

segments.text: Been getting KO'd repeatedly, so here we go
segments.original_text: 何度も撃墜されてるのでこれで

segments.text: That forward smash was scary but just barely missed!
segments.original_text: どうよ横スマ怖かったがわずかに届かず

segments.text: Playing aggressive - keeps the airdodge active
segments.original_text: 強気ですね回避を切らない
呼んでいる上投げはどうだ

segments.text: Playing out the spin action to the very end
segments.original_text: 最後までスピン後の行動

full_text: Hard to create openings with a spin against that neutral getup near the blast zone Been getting KO'd repeatedly, so here we go That forward smash was scary but just barely missed! Neo mashes out Up tilt connects for 134 Playing aggressive - keeps the airdodge active How about that up throw? Ouch, that's a brutal KO Playing out the spin action to the very end

corrections.reason: 崖のその場起き上がり
